name: part_001
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】hololive 3rd Generation Live#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜【DAY2】 [XJJXk28ivwY]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: Slideshow showcasing a vast collection of fan messages, letters, and illustrations dedicated to the members of hololive 3rd generation.
Title card for the live event: 'hololive 3rd Generation Live #KyururunDaisakusen ~The Strongest Idol, You Have No Choice But To Support Her!~'.
Attention slide displaying venue rules, safety warnings about flashing lights, and confirmation that vocal cheering is allowed.
Secondary merchandise showcase featuring various event-exclusive goods like penlights, T-shirts, and acrylic stands.
Return to the main event title card before the transition to the fan video section.
A montage of fan-submitted short videos begins, accompanied by an upbeat idol song performed by the 3rd generation members.

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の点滅にご注意ください
subtitles.english: For production reasons, please be aware of flashing lights.

subtitles.original: たくさんの素敵なショート動画ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you for the many wonderful short videos!

subtitles.original: 君のこと大好き大好き大好き大好き大好き！
subtitles.english: I love you, love you, love you, love you, love you so much!

subtitles.original: 溢れるこの愛きっと止まらない
subtitles.english: This overflowing love surely won't stop

subtitles.original: ぜひ最後までお楽しみください！
